title: aquilegia vicaria subsp. tianschanica
intro: Aquilegia vicaria subsp. tianschanica, also known as the Tianshan columbine, is a plant species within the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) native to Central Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Aquilegia vicaria subsp. tianschanica often include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its safety and efficacy for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically studied.
